top_signals.title: ‘FOMO Really Got Me’: Taiwanese Go Deep Into Debt to Amp 100% Stock Rally
top_signals.summary: Taiwan's locals are borrowing so much to invest in the TSMC-fueled AI stock frenzy it's raising fears of a bubble.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Bridges Yuan Markets While Keeping Tight Grip on Currency
top_signals.summary: China is taking another step in its longstanding push to build a more global currency, bringing its domestic and offshore yuan markets a little closer together.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX kicks off bond sale days after record IPO, discloses over $100 billion cash pile
top_signals.summary: SpaceX on Monday unveiled a senior unsecured notes offering and said it held about $100.8 billion in cash.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Personal Income and Outlays, December 2025
top_signals.summary: Personal income increased $86.2 billion (0.3 percent at a monthly rate) in December, according to estimates released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis. Disposable personal income (DPI)-personal income less personal current taxes-increased $75.7 billion (0.3 percent), and personal consumption expenditures (PCE) increased $91.0 billion (0.4 percent). Personal outlays-the sum of PCE, personal interest payments, and personal current transfer payments-increased $90.2 billion in December. Personal saving was $830.8 billion in December, and the personal saving rate-personal saving as a percentage of disposable personal income-was 3.6 percent. Full Text
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Securitize asks court to reject tZERO’s ‘meritless’ tokenization patent allegations
top_signals.summary: Securitize alleged that tZERO's actions are "nothing more than the culmination" of shareholder pressure to capitalize on the patents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
